query:
UPDATE places SET 
  description = CASE name
    WHEN 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 'Kandooma Thila is one of the most famous dive sites in the Maldives, located in Kaafu Atoll. This underwater mountain rises from 60m to 20m and is surrounded by a rich ecosystem. Divers can expect to see reef sharks, tuna, jacks, and various reef fish. The site is suitable for experienced divers due to strong currents.'
    WHEN 'Maaya Thila' THEN 'Maaya Thila is a spectacular dive site in Ari Atoll featuring a submerged mountain with caves and overhangs. The site is famous for its abundance of marine life including reef sharks, groupers, snappers, and fusiliers. Night dives here are particularly spectacular with nocturnal creatures emerging.'
    WHEN 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 'Kudarah Thila is an excellent dive site in Ari Atoll suitable for intermediate and advanced divers. The site features a coral-covered pinnacle with caves and crevices. Marine life includes reef sharks, trevally, snappers, and various reef fish.'
  END,
  highlights = CASE name
    WHEN 'Kandooma Thila' THEN '["Reef Sharks", "Pelagic Fish", "Underwater Mountain", "Rich Marine Life"]'
    WHEN 'Maaya Thila' THEN '["Caves & Overhangs", "Reef Sharks", "Night Diving", "Abundant Fish Life"]'
    WHEN 'Kudarah Thila' THEN '["Coral Pinnacle", "Reef Sharks", "Caves", "Excellent Visibility"]'
  END,
  amenities = CASE name
    WHEN 'Kandooma Thila' THEN '["Dive Centers", "Boat Access", "Safety Equipment", "Guides"]'
    WHEN 'Maaya Thila' THEN '["Dive Centers", "Boat Access", "Night Dive Facilities", "Guides"]'
    WHEN 'Kudarah Thila' THEN '["Dive Centers", "Boat Access", "Safety Equipment", "Guides"]'
  END,
  icon = 'diving',
  color = '#2E86DE',
  difficulty = CASE name
    WHEN 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 'advanced'
    WHEN 'Maaya Thila' THEN 'intermediate'
    WHEN 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 'intermediate'
  END,
  rating = CASE name
    WHEN 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 4.7
    WHEN 'Maaya Thila' THEN 4.8
    WHEN 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 4.5
  END,
  reviews = CASE name
    WHEN 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 432
    WHEN 'Maaya Thila' THEN 567
    WHEN 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 289
  END,
  bestSeason = CASE name
    WHEN 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 'November to April'
    WHEN 'Maaya Thila' THEN 'Year-round'
    WHEN 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 'November to April'
  END
WHERE name IN ('Kandooma Thila', 'Maaya Thila', 'Kudarah Thila');
